business.about: Licensed and insured roofing contractors providing quality roof repairs, replacements, and inspections for homeowners and businesses.

services.name: Roof Inspection
services.description: Comprehensive roof inspection with detailed report. Identify leaks, damage, and wear before they become costly problems.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.description: Patch leaks, replace damaged shingles, fix flashing and vent issues. Most repairs completed same day.

services.name: Full Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and replacement with premium materials. Includes cleanup, haul-away, and manufacturer warranty.

services.name: Gutter Installation
services.description: Seamless aluminum gutters with downspouts. Protect your foundation from water damage.

testimonials.name: Happy Homeowner
testimonials.text: Fixed our leak fast and the price was fair. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Satisfied Client
testimonials.text: Professional crew, cleaned up everything. Roof looks brand new.

testimonials.name: Repeat Customer
testimonials.text: Used them for inspection and then full replacement. Great experience both times.

process.title: Free Estimate
process.description: We inspect your roof and provide a detailed, no-obligation quote.

process.title: Schedule the Work
process.description: Pick a date that works for you. We handle permits and materials.

process.title: Quality Guaranteed
process.description: Professional installation backed by our workmanship warranty.

chatbot.greeting: Hi! Need a roof inspection or repair estimate? I can help!
qualifyingQuestions: Are you dealing with a leak or storm damage?
Is this for insurance or out-of-pocket?
